info.title: Scrape Creators API
info.description: The easiest way to scrape public social media data at scale. Extract profiles, posts, videos, comments, and more from TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, Twitter, LinkedIn, Facebook, Reddit, and 15+ platforms.

tags.name: TikTok
tags.description: Scrape TikTok profiles, videos, and more

get.description: Scrapes a public TikTok profile

parameters.name: handle
parameters.description: TikTok handle

get.description: Get the audience demographics of a TikTok user. Right now you can only get the audience countries. 🚨 Costs 26 credits per request.

parameters.name: handle
parameters.description: TikTok handle

get.description: Scrapes videos from a TikTok profile. Pass cursor to get more videos.

parameters.name: handle
parameters.description: TikTok handle

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: TikTok user id. Use this for faster responses.

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: What to sort by

parameters.name: max_cursor
parameters.description: Cursor to get more videos. Get 'max_cursor' from previous response.

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Region (Country) you want the proxy in. Defaults to US.

parameters.name: trim
parameters.description: Set to true for a trimmed down version of the response

aweme_list.desc: You can say whatever you want about the WNBA is but it’s never boring

get.description: Scrapes data from a TikTok video

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: TikTok video URL

parameters.name: get_transcript
parameters.description: Get transcript of the video

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Region of the proxy. Sometimes you'll need to specify the region if you're not getting a response. Commonly for videos from the Phillipines, in which case you'd use 'PH'. Use 2 letter country codes like US, GB, FR, etc

parameters.name: trim
parameters.description: Set to true to get a trimmed response

aweme_detail.desc: You can say whatever you want about the WNBA is but it’s never boring

get.description: Scrapes transcript from a TikTok video

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: TikTok video URL

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: Language of the transcript. 2 letter language code, ie 'en', 'es', 'fr', 'de', 'it', 'ja', 'ko', 'zh'

parameters.name: use_ai_as_fallback
parameters.description: Set to 'true' to use AI as a fallback to get the transcript if the transcript is not found. Costs 10 credits to use this feature. And only if the video is under 2 minutes.

example.transcript:
WEBVTT


00:00:00.120 --> 00:00:01.840
Alright, pizza review time.

00:00:01.841 --> 00:00:03.761
Sal's Pizza Factory. Oh,

00:00:03.762 --> 00:00:05.721
it's Fucking Corn. We're in Charlotte.

00:00:05.722 --> 00:00:07.861
Alright man, any chance I can get a real quick picture?

00:00:07.920 --> 00:00:10.040
Shaq or Dwight Howard? I gotta pick one.\n

get.description: Scrapes a TikTok user's live stream

parameters.name: handle
parameters.description: TikTok handle

get.description: Scrapes comments from a TikTok video

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: TikTok video URL

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Cursor to get more comments. Get 'cursor' from previous response.

parameters.name: trim
parameters.description: Set to true to get a trimmed response

get.description: Scrapes accounts that a TikTok user follows

parameters.name: handle
parameters.description: TikTok handle

parameters.name: min_time
parameters.description: Used to paginate. Get 'min_time' from previous response.

parameters.name: trim
parameters.description: Set to true to get a trimmed response

get.description: Scrapes followers of a TikTok account

parameters.name: handle
parameters.description: TikTok handle

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: User id. Use this for faster response times.

parameters.name: min_time
parameters.description: Used to paginate. Get 'min_time' from previous response.

parameters.name: trim
parameters.description: Set to true to get a trimmed response

get.description: Scrapes TikTok users matching a search query

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search query for users

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Cursor to get more users. Get 'cursor' from previous response.

parameters.name: trim
parameters.description: Set to true to get a trimmed response

get.description: Scrapes TikTok videos by hashtag

parameters.name: hashtag
parameters.description: Hashtag to search for (without #)

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Region the proxy will be set to. Note: this isn't going to grab you all tiktoks from this region, you're just setting the proxy there.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Cursor to get more videos. Get 'cursor' from previous response.

parameters.name: trim
parameters.description: Set to true to get a trimmed response

get.description: Scrapes TikTok videos matching a keyword

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Keyword to search for

parameters.name: date_posted
parameters.description: Time Frame

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Sort by

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Note, this doesn't filter the tiktoks only in a specfic region, it puts the proxy there. Use it in case you want to scrape posts only available for some country. Use 2 letter country codes like US, GB, FR, etc

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Cursor to get more videos. Get 'cursor' from previous response.

parameters.name: trim
parameters.description: Set to true to get a trimmed response

get.description: There is a 'Top' Search in TikTok and this is that. You can get Photo Carousels and Videos. Whereas with just the Keyword Search, you can only get Videos.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Keyword to search for

parameters.name: publish_time
parameters.description: Time Frame TikTok was posted

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Sort by

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Note, this doesn't filter the tiktoks only in a specfic region, it puts the proxy there. Use it in case you want to scrape posts only available for some country. Use 2 letter country codes like US, GB, FR, etc

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Cursor to get more videos. Get 'cursor' from previous response.

items.desc: Last two brain cells at 3 am 💀 (IB: @Marearo) #dance #trend #fun

get.description: This endpoint can take up to 30 seconds. Get popular songs from TikTok. If you want to check out the page this is actually scraping, check out: https://ads.tiktok.com/business/creativecenter/inspiration/popular/music/pc/en

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number

parameters.name: timePeriod
parameters.description: Time period to get popular songs from

parameters.name: rankType
parameters.description: Get popular or surging songs

parameters.name: newOnBoard
parameters.description: New to top 100

parameters.name: commercialMusic
parameters.description: Approved for business use?

parameters.name: countryCode
parameters.description: Country code to get popular songs from

get.description: Get popular creators from TikTok. Filter by follower count, creator country, audience country, and sort by engagement, follower count, or average views.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sort creators by engagement, follower count, or average views

parameters.name: followerCount
parameters.description: Filter by follower count range

parameters.name: creatorCountry
parameters.description: Country code of the creator

parameters.name: audienceCountry
parameters.description: Country code of the audience/follower

get.description: Get popular videos from TikTok. Filter by time period, country, and sort by likes, views (hot), comments, or reposts.

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: Time period in days (7 or 30)

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number

parameters.name: orderBy
parameters.description: Sort videos by likes, views (hot), comments, or reposts

parameters.name: countryCode
parameters.description: Country code to get popular videos from

videos.title: we can't believe we are the top artist of 2025 on @TikTok globally 🥹🖤 thank you EYEKONS for your endless support, dance covers, KATSEYE core videos, and more!! WE LOVE YOU

get.description: Get popular hashtags from TikTok. Filter by time period, country, and show newly trending hashtags.

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: Time period in days (7, 30, or 120)

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number

parameters.name: countryCode
parameters.description: Country code to get popular hashtags from

parameters.name: newOnBoard
parameters.description: Show only newly trending hashtags

parameters.name: industry
parameters.description: Industry to get popular hashtags from.

get.description: Scraping details from the song detail

parameters.name: clipId
parameters.description: This is a little confusing because this isn't songId like you'd think. It is the clipId. I guess because you can clip different portions of a song 🤷‍♂️

share_info.share_desc_info: Users all over the world are having fun making their own versions of the song Different (Acoustic) on TikTok! Tap here >>
share_info.share_title: Amazing! I just found a bunch of funny videos! #TikTok > Different (Acoustic)

get.description: Get the TikToks using a song

parameters.name: clipId
parameters.description: This is clipId. Can be found on a url like so: https://www.tiktok.com/music/That%27s-Who-I-Praise-7370375686554782506, where 7370375686554782506 is the clipId

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: The cursor to get the next page of results.

get.description: Get the trending feed from TikTok.

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Where you want the proxy to be. This doesn't mean that you will only see TikToks from this region, you will just see the content that isn't banned in that region.

parameters.name: trim
parameters.description: Set to true to get a trimmed response.
